product.name: LazBlinds No Tools No Drill Cordless Cellular Shades, Light Filtering Honeycomb Shades for Home, Thermal Insulation Blinds for Windows, 34" W x 64" H, White
features: Inside Mount ONLY. For better internal installation, a standard 3/8 inch deduction is made to the width for a proper INSIDE MOUNT fit. The actual blind size is 33 5/8" W x 64" H, perfect for window 34" W x 64" H. The unique spring rod can extend 1 inch in total, allow the blind to fit for window size W33.7-34.6 X H64".

No Drill Blinds: LazBlinds patented technology No Tools-No Drill system allow it no need to drill any holes on your window frame, great for Renter, Landlord, and Home Buyer. Easy to Install in 30 seconds with no tools-no drill, screws, or brackets. And it can afford maximum 30kg. Fit All Kinds of Walls, like woodiness metope, tile marble, concrete wall and rough tile.

Cordless Blinds for Windows: The cord-free design provides a clean, tangle-free look to the window and creates a safer environment for children and pets. Easy to raise up or lower down to gently filter sunlight.

Sound & Heat Insulation: The unique honeycomb structure creates air pockets to insulate your home against outside thermal energy in summer and keeps outside cold away from your warm house in winter by trapping air in the cells. It also works well in noise reduction and privacy protection, so as to provide you with a comfortable space.
Light Filtering: Premium soft non-woven polyester fabric provide privacy while allowing a soft light into the room. Perfect for living room, family room, bedroom, dinning room.
